rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, effectively reorganizing the original text to improve clarity and flow.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved sentence structure.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing clear uncertainty disclosure throughout the revised text.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), demonstrating a clear understanding of the task requirements.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were introduced in the revised text; instead, it identifies and addresses potential issues with the original content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing transparent provenance and traceability throughout the revision process.
